content: As of June 2026: Anthropic PAUSED the planned separate Agent SDK/claude -p credit pool. Headless usage (claude -p, Agent SDK, GitHub Actions, third-party subscription apps) still draws from the SAME subscription usage pool as interactive Claude Code/claude.ai/Desktop. Limits: 5-hour rolling window (doubled May 6 2026) + two weekly limits (all-models + Sonnet-only) that reset weekly. Max 5x=$100/mo, Max 20x=$200/mo. All product surfaces share one pool. The separate-credit change could return; treat as a moving target.
